title: [FIRRTL][LowerCHIRRTL] Fix enable inference for aggregates
body:
Sequential memory read ports have enable inference which sets the enable
high at the location the address is written to.  We missed that this enable
inference is only active when the address is something with a name.
This adds a more complicated check to turn on enable inference for ports
which verifies that the value used is a port, wire, reg, regreset, or
node.

h/t @fabianschuiki  thanks for pointing out this issue!
